ncs_standard_definition.description_short: Captures high-quality images of buildings, structures, and landscapes for architectural and design purposes.
ncs_standard_definition.description_detailed: Uses technical skills and creative vision to produce visually appealing and informative photographs of buildings, structures, and landscapes for architectural and design purposes, including capturing details, textures, and lighting effects.

first_stepper.description: High school students interested in photography can start by learning the basics of photography, including camera settings, lighting, and composition.

choice_maker.description: Individuals with a generic degree can bridge their skills by taking photography courses, workshops, or certification programs.

future_builder.description: Experienced photographers can advance their careers by developing their technical skills, learning new software, and building a strong portfolio.
future_builder.prerequisite_experience: 2 years of experience as a photographer

problem_solver_uturn.description: Individuals from unrelated fields can transition into architectural photography by developing their technical skills and building a portfolio.
